_comment: Self-made geometry_config for SceneX (single-layout). World frame == OUR frame, so scene_matrix is identity. preprocess does kp@I.T (no-op) then subtracts tx -> everything tx-relative. Units = METERS. Origin = inner corner of taped activity square nearest the TX. +x = TX->RX(far) baseline along floor, +y = left edge of square, +z = up. Fill tx/rx from triangulated antenna tips.
